items.title: Tournament additional turns mismatch
items.message: Derived source conflicts with local official tournament rules, which specify five additional turns after the active player finishes their turn.

items.title: Tournament win-by-two mismatch
items.message: Derived source conflicts with local official tournament rules, which determine the winner by score after additional turns rather than a two-point lead.
